landing.subheadline: A calm visual second brain for articles, notes, images, and ideas. Save fast, rediscover easily, and read it back in the language that feels natural to you.
landing.feature1Desc: Articles, notes, images, audio, and references live together in one calm visual space.
landing.feature2Title: Find it when you need it
landing.feature2Desc: Search by concept, memory, or mood and jump back into what mattered without digging.
landing.feature3Desc: Titles, summaries, and tags adapt to you, so recall feels natural instead of translated.
landing.sectionTitle: Built for keeping what matters close.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your second brain
auth.signInPanelTitle: Pick up where you left off
auth.signInPanelBody: Everything you saved stays organized, searchable, and ready when you want to think with it again.
auth.signInPanelPoint1Desc: Save in one language, search in another, and revisit ideas in the language that feels natural.
auth.signInPanelPoint2Desc: Articles, notes, images, and audio live together in one visual memory space.
auth.signUpPanelTitle: Build a second brain that feels personal
auth.signUpPanelBody: Capture what matters now, then return to it later in a calmer, clearer, more visual way.
auth.signUpPanelPoint1Desc: Links, notes, images, and audio all land in one place with structure applied automatically.
auth.signUpPanelPoint2Desc: Your saved ideas come back organized, readable, and adapted to the language you prefer.
auth.chooseLanguageSubtitle: YourMind will present everything in this language

dashboard.title: Your Mind
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Save articles, notes, images, and more. Everything will be organized and presented in your language.
dashboard.processingFailedMsg: The item timed out. Try saving it again.

saveModal.title: Save to YourMind
saveModal.dropOrClick: Drop file here or click to browse

search.title: Search your mind
search.subtitle: Type in any language — find content saved in every language

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize how YourMind works for you
settings.languageSubtitle: All summaries, tags, and content will be presented in this language
